title: Border Weaver
description: Use the special "Boundary Weaver's Ruler" to quickly set the world boundary by marking the four corners, and automatically prevent the generation of creatures outside the boundary.
body:
中文版本：
🧶 边界编织者 (Border Weaver)
Border Weaver 是一款轻量且实用的功能性模组，旨在为服务器管理员、视频创作者和生存挑战玩家提供最直观的世界边界控制手段。

✨ 核心功能
尺规划界：不再需要繁琐的坐标计算！使用模组提供的“边界编织者之尺”，依次点击四个方块（四个角），模组将自动计算中心点并覆盖划定的区域。

生态锁死：边界之外即是禁区。模组会自动拦截所有试图在世界边界外生成的生物，确保你的挑战区域整洁且安全。

一键重置：操作失误？按住 Shift + 右键空气 即可瞬间重置世界边界至默认大小，并清空所有坐标记录。

独立分类：在创造模式中拥有专属标签页，方便快速获取工具。

🛠️ 使用说明
从创造模式标签页或指令获取 边界编织者之尺。

右键 点击地面上的四个方块，分别作为你想要划定的区域的四个顶点。

点击完第四个点后，世界边界将自动收缩/扩张至该范围。

若需撤销边界，按住 Shift 并对空 右键 即可。

English Version:
🧶 Border Weaver
Border Weaver is a lightweight utility mod that provides an intuitive way to control world borders, perfect for server admins, content creators, and hardcore survival challenges.

✨ Features
Four-Corner Selection: Forget complex coordinate math! Just use the "Border Weaver's Ruler" to click four blocks (four corners), and the mod will automatically calculate the center and set the border size.

Spawn Prevention: The area outside the border is a true void. This mod automatically prevents any entities from spawning outside the world border.

Quick Reset: Made a mistake? Shift + Right-Click the air to instantly reset the world border to its default maximum size and clear all recorded coordinates.

Custom Creative Tab: Includes a dedicated creative tab for easy access to the tools.

🛠️ How to Use
Obtain the Border Weaver's Ruler from the custom creative tab.

Right-click four blocks to mark the vertices of your desired area.

Upon selecting the 4th corner, the world border will automatically update to fit the area.

To remove the border, hold Shift and Right-click the air.
